components.text: Hello world!
Installation complete

Hi {{1}}, your {{2}} installation is complete! Our technician has configured your connection, and you're now ready to go online. If you have any issues, feel free to reply or contact {{3}} for assistance.
Technician visit
Hi {{1}}, we're scheduling a technician visit for your {{2}} on {{3}} between {{4}} and {{5}}. Please confirm if this time slot works for you.
Reminder: Our technician will visit your location on {{1}} at {{2}} for your broadband installation. Please be available.
Appointment cancelled

Hi {{1}},
Your appointment on {{2}} has been cancelled. We hope to see you another time.
